triples.subject: China
triples.object: a world leader in making and buying EVs
triples.sentence: Before most people could realize the extent of what was happening, China became a world leader in making and buying EVs.

triples.subject: China
triples.object: the world’s largest market for EVs in 2022
triples.sentence: making 2022 the eighth consecutive year in which China was the world’s largest market for EVs.

triples.subject: US
triples.sentence: For comparison, the US only sold about 800,000 EVs in 2022.

triples.subject: Wan Gang
triples.object: China’s minister of science and technology in 2007
triples.sentence: Then, in 2007, the industry got a significant boost when Wan Gang, an auto engineer who had worked for Audi in Germany for a decade, became China’s minister of science and technology.

triples.subject: Chinese government
triples.object: over 200 billion RMB ($29 billion) into relevant subsidies and tax breaks
triples.sentence: From 2009 to 2022, the government poured over 200 billion RMB ($29 billion) into relevant subsidies and tax breaks.

triples.subject: EVs sold in China in 2022
triples.object: over half of global EV sales
triples.sentence: the more than 6 million EVs sold in China in 2022 accounted for over half of global EV sales.
